articles.title: XinFin selects Butterfly Protocol for XDC blockchain domain naming system
articles.description: Butterfly Protocol, a decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) building a decentralized naming system, and the XDC Network, announced this week that the Butterfly Protocol will be used for an XDC blockchain-specific domain system. Created by XinFin, the XDC Network is an open-source, delegated proof of stake consensus network (XDPoS), which enables hybrid relay bridges, instant block...

articles.title: Elon Musk Claims Dogecoin Is "Strongest" Cryptocurrency When It Comes to Payments
articles.description: The entrepreneur is on the same page with fellow billionaire Mark Cuban when it comes to promoting Dogecoin as a means of payment

articles.title: Cardano ($ADA) ‘Is Ready To Run to $5’, Says Crypto Analyst
articles.description: Prominent crypto analyst and trader Michaël van de Poppe, who believes that Cardano’s $ADA token is “strongest coins out there”, recently explains how the $ADA price could hit $5 in the near future. In a video released on his YouTube channel on August 11, he looked at $ADA’s recent price action using technical analysis, and had […]

articles.title: Polygon Begins Foray Into ZK With $250M Hermez Network Merger
articles.description: Polygon has announced a merger with Hermez Network, a prominent zero-knowledge (ZK) cryptography-based scaling project. The post Polygon Begins Foray Into ZK With $250M Hermez Network Merger appeared first on BeInCrypto.

articles.title: XRP closing in higher than Bitcoin on this metric is a rare phenomenon
articles.description: XRP’s fall that took the alt’s price from its all-time high of $3.31 to under $1, shook its investors and traders. However, this rally came as a sigh of relief to these investors as the alt’s price rallied almost 40% in a week. Oddly, Bitcoin, Ethereum, and even BNB had registered lower price gains as […]

articles.title: Biden Reportedly Chooses New CFTC Chair to Oversee Crypto Market
articles.description: Rostin Behnam, the acting chair of the CFTC, will reportedly be nominated in the near future

articles.title: Theta Network (THETA) partners with ONE Championship to launch NFT Marketplace
articles.description: ONE Championship (ONE) today announced an exclusive global partnership with Theta Network (THETA), an industry-leading blockchain platform, to launch ONE’s first-ever non-fungible token (NFT) marketplace featuring collectibles that celebrate ONE’s superstar athletes and their most memorable moments.

articles.title: Cardano’s Alonzo Upgrade Date Revealed — ADA Gains Over 16% After Announcement
articles.description: On Friday, the price of the token cardano spiked over the $2 handle nearing the crypto asset’s all-time high that took place three months ago. Cardano’s price jump derived from a video announcement stemming from Cardano’s Nigel Hemsley when he explained the Cardano network would upgrade on September 12, 2021. The highly anticipated “Alonzo Purple” […]

articles.title: Ukraine’s Security Service Closes Illegal Cryptocurrency Exchanges
articles.description: Ukrainian authorities have allegedly reported that cryptocurrency exchanges are involved in illicit financial activities, including money laundering. Ukraine’s Security Service, known as SBU, has closed down various crypto exchanges reported to have transacted illegally since early 2021. The SBU, in a Wednesday statement, referred to cryptocurrency exchanges as the network of ‘clandestine’-...
